analysis-suite.description: Static allowlist for Analysis Mode commands: query_triage_db, generate_image_timeline, start_volatility_analysis, test_siem_connection, save_siem_config, export_triage_to_siem, extract_memory_keys. In Tauri 2.0.0, static capabilities are merged at build time; runtime enforcement is handled by the Rust-side AcquisitionMode guard.

default.description: Static allowlist for always-active Capture Mode commands and core utilities: set_acquisition_mode, get_admin_status, scan_devices, browse_folder, browse_file, check_checkpoint, start_acquisition, cancel_acquisition, start_triage, list_volumes, start_live_acquisition, get_cases, get_case_details, export_case_report, browse_yara_folder, load_plugin, list_plugins, unload_plugin, scan_plugins_directory, get_siem_config, pgp_get_key_info, pgp_generate_new_key, pgp_verify_manifest, inspect_volume_encryption
